Domino’s committed fraud.
On 19th January, I placed an order worth ₹6,000. I entered the delivery address as Patiala, but the system automatically selected the store location as Okhla, Delhi.
When I realized this mistake, I tried to contact the store. I got the store’s number through chat support, but the number was switched off. Despite this, they prepared the order without confirming anything with me, even though it was a high-value order.
Later, they called me, but by that time I had already requested a refund.
They never called to confirm the address before preparing the order, which they should have done for such a big order.
When I asked to cancel, they did not cancel the order, kept the pizzas with themselves, and did not issue any refund.
This is completely unprofessional and unfair. I want my full refund.
